title: Contract Staffing
desc: Flexible contract placements for project-based needs, seasonal demand, and specialized technology requirements with rapid deployment capabilities.

title: Direct Hire Placement
desc: Comprehensive permanent recruitment with rigorous technical assessment, cultural fit evaluation, and executive search for senior technology roles.

title: Managed Team Services
desc: Fully managed engineering teams that operate as an extension of your organization with dedicated delivery management and technical leadership.

title: Payroll Management
desc: Comprehensive employer-of-record services including payroll processing, benefits administration, tax compliance, and worker classification management.

title: Recruitment Process Outsourcing
desc: End-to-end RPO solutions that scale your recruitment capabilities, reduce cost-per-hire, and improve quality-of-hire through optimized processes.

title: Global Immigration Services
desc: Complete immigration support including H-1B, L-1, O-1, EB-2/EB-3 Green Card sponsorship, and global mobility management across 12 countries.

title: Technical Assessment & Vetting
desc: Multi-stage technical assessment including coding challenges, system design interviews, behavioral evaluation, and background verification.

title: Contract-to-Hire Programs
desc: Try-before-you-hire engagement models allowing evaluation of skills and cultural fit before making permanent hiring commitments.

title: Executive & Leadership Search
desc: Specialized retained search for CTO, VP of Engineering, CIO, and other technology leadership positions across enterprise and growth-stage companies.
